case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC VS. OSCAR LEE et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 76757236) FILED BY ATTORNEY PIERCE, EMILY
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC SERVED JUN-05-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, OSCAR

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $425.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 15167040) AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, OSCAR

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, OSCAR $21,236.42 PRINCIPAL, $425.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $21,661.42, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 15167040)

SUPPLEMENTAL DELCARATION IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT; WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES; ACCOUNT PURCHASE DATE (TRANSACTION ID # 15167040) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, OSCAR

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT DECLARATION : VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, OSCAR DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-24-2014
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-14-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DOES 1 TO 25 ONLY (TRANSACTION ID # 15167040)
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, OSCAR
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, OSCAR
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 15035094) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, OSCAR
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-14-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
